seg2_desc: Public infrastructure, municipalities and government facilities

services_subtitle: Comprehensive end-to-end infrastructure and technology solutions
about_p1: Black Arrow Company is a Saudi-based trading and solutions provider dedicated to delivering comprehensive infrastructure and technology solutions across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. With a strategic focus on Electric Vehicle (EV) infrastructure, Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) systems, HVAC solutions, and specialised engineering products, we provide complete, end-to-end services tailored to modern market demands.
about_p2: Operating in alignment with Saudi Vision 2030, we actively support the Kingdom's transformation toward sustainable energy, smart infrastructure, and diversified economic growth.
vision_text: To become a leading Saudi trading and solutions provider driving the Kingdom's transition toward sustainable energy, resilient infrastructure, and smart technologies — in full alignment with Saudi Vision 2030.
mission_text: Deliver innovative, sustainable, and reliable solutions that empower businesses, support critical infrastructure, and contribute to Saudi Arabia's vision for a technologically advanced and environmentally responsible future.
why1_desc: We integrate the latest technologies to deliver future-ready solutions
why2_desc: Every system we deliver is engineered for uptime and operational excellence
why3_desc: Our solutions actively contribute to Saudi Arabia's national transformation
why4_desc: Supply, installation, testing, commissioning, and long-term maintenance
clients_subtitle: We have successfully served clients across key sectors in Saudi Arabia
wa_subtitle: Our team is ready to assist you on WhatsApp
contact_address_val: Ad Dammam, Ash Sharqiyah 32245, Saudi Arabia
footer_desc: Delivering comprehensive infrastructure and technology solutions across Saudi Arabia in alignment with Saudi Vision 2030.
footer_copy: © 2024 Black Arrow Company. All rights reserved.
service_ev_desc: AC & DC charging stations, smart POS integration, and preventive maintenance for a seamless electric mobility ecosystem.
service_ups_desc: Turnkey power backup systems, battery solutions, installation, testing, and long-term maintenance.
service_lighting_desc: Façade, exterior, interior, signage, and specialized lighting systems combining efficiency and smart technology.
service_fire_desc: Advanced detection, suppression, and integrated safety systems engineered for rapid response and international compliance.
service_hvac_desc: Comprehensive climate control including air handling units, ductwork, smart controls, and energy-efficient installations.
service_electrical_desc: Switchgear, distribution boards, control panels, and integrated systems for reliable energy delivery.
service_trading_desc: High-quality equipment and specialized products across industrial, safety, aviation, oil & gas, and IT sectors.
about_p3: We serve a wide range of sectors, including commercial, industrial, hospitality, healthcare, and public infrastructure, delivering solutions that meet international standards while addressing local regulatory and operational requirements.
about_p4: Driven by innovation, quality, and strong partnerships, Black Arrow is committed to building resilient systems that empower businesses, enable clean mobility, and support the future-ready infrastructure of Saudi Arabia.

partner_intro_p1: Eight Stars Eastern is your gateway to the Saudi Arabian market. We represent international brands and manufacturers across all sectors. Whether you're in industrial equipment, technology, infrastructure, or specialized solutions — let's discuss how we can bring your brand to KSA.
partner_intro_p2: With over 20+ B2B clients served across commercial, government, and hospitality sectors, we have the market expertise, regulatory knowledge, and established relationships to accelerate your entry into Saudi Arabia.
